name: corcept_hook_stop_check
title: Corcept Hook: Stop Check
description: Evaluate completion-gating (stale tests / missing evidence) on a Claude Code Stop event. Authority: Plan. Trust ceiling: Reviewed. Pass the hook event JSON in the hook_input argument.

hook_input.description: Claude Code hook event JSON (the payload the CLI would otherwise read from stdin). When omitted, the CLI falls back to reading stdin.
